meta.homeAnswerHeading: Ongles Maily — nail salon at Carrefour Beauport
meta.servicesAnswerBlock: Ongles Maily offers four core services: nail enhancements (full set), fills, hand care and foot care. Pricing depends on the service and finishes; a full set sits in an affordable range and a fill costs less than a new set.

pose-ongles.answerBlock: A nail enhancement is a full set, with or without extensions, shaped and finished to your taste. At Ongles Maily, in Carrefour Beauport, the service includes shaping and colour at an affordable price range.

remplissage.metaDescription: Professional nail fill every 2–3 weeks at Ongles Maily, Carrefour Beauport. Keep your enhancements fresh and strong. From $45.
remplissage.schemaDescription: Professional nail fill every 2–3 weeks at Ongles Maily, Carrefour Beauport. Keep your enhancements fresh and strong. From $45.
remplissage.heroAlt: Professional nail fill in progress at Ongles Maily, Carrefour Beauport
remplissage.answerBlock: A fill maintains an existing set by filling in regrowth at the base of the nail, usually every 2 to 3 weeks. At Ongles Maily it costs less than a new set and keeps your nails neat and strong for longer.

nearMe.answerHeading: Nail salon in Beauport — Ongles Maily at Carrefour Beauport
nearMe.answerBlock: Ongles Maily is Beauport's go-to nail salon, located at Carrefour Beauport, 3333 rue du Carrefour, right off the Félix-Leclerc Expressway and the Robert-Bourassa interchange. Beauport is a residential borough on the eastern side of Québec City, and our salon has served its residents for over 15 years — welcoming clients from Giffard, Montmorency, and the surrounding east-end neighbourhoods. Free parking is available directly at the shopping centre, making it easy to fit an appointment into your day. Whether you live in Beauport or are passing through, you will find a full menu of nail services at Ongles Maily: full nail enhancements, fills, manicures, and pedicures. Our hygiene standards set us apart — every tool is disinfected between clients and every workstation is sanitized after each service. You can book your appointment online at any time or simply walk in; both options are always welcome. We are open seven days a week to fit around your schedule, with no need to plan far in advance.
nearMe.body: Carrefour Beauport sits at the corner of rue du Carrefour and boulevard Raymond, easily reachable from Route 138 and Highway 440. The salon is located near entrances 4 and 5. Free on-site parking.
nearMe.metaTitle: Nail salon in Beauport — Ongles Maily | Carrefour Beauport
nearMe.metaDescription: Nail salon in Beauport: nail enhancements, fills, manicures and pedicures at Ongles Maily, Carrefour Beauport. Walk-ins welcome, open 7 days.
